{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-64642", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-285"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}], "description": "## Impact

Crafted requests targeting Next.js applications using App Router built with Turbopack and a **single** entry in `config.i18n.locales` can bypass middleware/proxy based authentication.

## Workarounds

If you cannot upgrade immediately, enforce authorization in the page's server-side data path instead of relying solely on middleware.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24", "html_url": "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/security/advisories/GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-64642"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-07-21T16:02:47Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/14217083?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/KarimPwnz", "id": 14217083, "login": "KarimPwnz", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE0MjE3MDgz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/KarimPwnz", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "high", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Middleware / Proxy bypass in App Router applications using Turbopack and single locale", "updated_at": "2026-07-21T16:02:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/vercel/next.js/security-advisories/GHSA-6gpp-xcg3-4w24", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next"}, "patched_versions": "16.2.11", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": " >= 16.0.0 < 16.2.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
